description: Composition100 % cotton magenta sleeveless top with a round neck, softly ribbed around the neckline and armpits, and with an embroidered brand name close to the hem on the left FittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool water at 30 CUse mild detergentDo not scrubDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringDo not dry in direct sunlightCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryWash, dry and iron inside outDo not dry cleanSporty and chic, this magenta top from s.oliver is perfect for those warm summer days.
